name: Drawer
description: A drawer component that slides in from the edge of the screen, built on Vaul.
whenToUse: Use for mobile-friendly dialogs, bottom sheets, navigation panels, and secondary content on small screens.

props.name: direction
props.description: The direction the drawer slides in from
